about.title: Portfolio Overview
about.subtitle: AI-powered applications focused on real-world productivity and automation
about.vision1: This portfolio brings together AI-powered applications focused on personal productivity, smart finances, sports analytics, and AI-assisted software generation, showcasing a solid range of real-world use cases for intelligent assistants and modern automation.
about.vision2: From daily intelligence briefings for commuters to fantasy football analytics and AI-assisted development studios, each application demonstrates how artificial intelligence can transform complex data into actionable insights and streamline decision-making processes.
about.vision3Bold: AI-first solutions that convert complex information into simple decisions
about.vision3End: , optimize user time and resources, and accelerate the creation of new digital products.
about.value1Desc: AI Commute, BudgetFlow, and Agile Tracker help users and teams consume information, decide, and prioritize better with less friction.
about.value2Desc: FootballStats and BudgetFlow show how to transform raw data (sports, finance) into actionable indicators and intuitive visualizations.
about.value3Desc: VibeForge positions the portfolio at the frontier of AI for development, from idea to structured code ready for production.

projects.title: AI-Powered Applications
projects.subtitle: A comprehensive portfolio showcasing real-world intelligent automation

aiCommute.title: AI Commute Summarizer
aiCommute.tagline: Daily Intelligence Briefing, Synthesized for the Road
aiCommute.description: Daily assistant that converts news sources, briefings, and internal updates into brief, easy-to-consume summaries during commute time. AI generative application for information consumption on the go.

budgetFlow.title: BudgetFlow (MoneyMinder)
budgetFlow.description: Personal finance platform with intelligent tracking of income and expenses, flexible categorization, visual reports, and multilingual support (English & Spanish). AI-powered financial insights through visualizations and recommendations.

agileTracker.title: Processing Team Agile Tracker
agileTracker.description: Agile management tool for teams, focused on sprint planning, collaboration, goal alignment, and visualization of progress and team velocity. AI supports task orchestration, prioritization, and continuous tracking.

vibeForge.title: VibeForge - Smooth Build Studio
vibeForge.description: AI-powered development environment where users describe product vision and the system generates page structure, components, and services with instant preview and exportable code. Most advanced AI as product copilot and production code generator without vendor lock-in.

footballStats.title: FootballStats - Fantasy Power Index
footballStats.tagline: Fantasy Pitch Pulse: Advanced Football Analytics
footballStats.description: Football analytics dashboard with player rankings, proprietary FPI metrics, multiple leagues (Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Serie A, Champions League) and sections like Dream Team Builder and Fantasy Rankings. AI and near-real-time data for advanced sports analytics.

hearthbeat.title: Hearthbeat Family Hub
hearthbeat.description: Family hub concept integrating coordination, communication, and intelligent recommendations for the home. Combines scheduling, shared tasks, and AI-powered suggestions to streamline family life.

thursdayFootball.title: ThursdayFootball
thursdayFootball.description: Social platform to organize football matches between friends and colleagues. Create games, manage teams, track who's playing, and handle jersey washing duties rotation. Perfect for casual weekly football groups.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by forward-thinking companies worldwide
testimonials.t1Text: The AI strategy roadmap they delivered transformed our approach to data processing. We reduced manual work by 60% and our team now focuses on high-value tasks.
testimonials.t2Text: Their expertise in AI integration was exactly what we needed. They seamlessly connected our legacy systems with modern ML capabilities, delivering results ahead of schedule.
testimonials.t3Text: The sports analytics dashboard they built for us processes millions of data points in real-time. Our users love the intuitive visualizations and predictive insights.
testimonials.t4Text: From concept to production in just 8 weeks. Their AI-assisted development approach accelerated our time-to-market dramatically. Highly recommended for any AI project.
